user.title: Smart Sprinkler System
user.description: Configure your sprinkler system. Give it a name and specify how many zones you have.

data_description.system_name: A unique name for this sprinkler system
data_description.zone_count: How many irrigation zones does your system have?

zones.title: Zone Names
zones.description: Give each zone a descriptive name (e.g., "Front Lawn", "Garden Beds").

zone_switches.title: Zone Switch Mapping
zone_switches.description: Select the switch entity that controls each zone. These are typically ESPHome, Z-Wave, or Zigbee relay switches.

data_description.zone_1_switch: The switch entity that controls Zone 1
data_description.zone_2_switch: The switch entity that controls Zone 2
data_description.zone_3_switch: The switch entity that controls Zone 3
data_description.zone_4_switch: The switch entity that controls Zone 4
data_description.zone_5_switch: The switch entity that controls Zone 5
data_description.zone_6_switch: The switch entity that controls Zone 6
data_description.zone_7_switch: The switch entity that controls Zone 7
data_description.zone_8_switch: The switch entity that controls Zone 8

weather.title: Weather Integration (Optional)
weather.description: Connect a weather entity and/or rain sensor to enable smart rain delay features.

data_description.enable_weather_integration: Use weather data to automatically skip watering when rain is expected
data_description.rain_sensor_entity: A binary sensor that detects rain

error.system_name: System name is required and must be at least 3 characters
error.zone_count: Zone count must be between 1 and 32
error.already_configured: A system with this name already exists

abort.already_configured: This sprinkler system is already configured

init.title: Options
init.description: Configure advanced settings for your sprinkler system.

data_description.enable_weather_integration: Automatically delay watering based on weather forecasts
data_description.rain_delay_hours: How long to delay watering after rain is detected
data_description.soil_moisture_threshold: Skip watering if soil moisture is above this percentage

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: Watering duration in minutes (optional, uses zone default if not specified)

enable_rain_delay.name: Enable Rain Delay
enable_rain_delay.description: Enable rain delay for a specified duration.

hours.name: Hours
hours.description: Number of hours to delay watering (default: 24)

disable_rain_delay.name: Disable Rain Delay
disable_rain_delay.description: Disable rain delay and resume normal operation.
